text: Have you ever wondered what the f*** is going on inside your company?
Because Jim sure as hell doesn't.
Following rapid growth, the leadership of a very busy and important company may fall to you.
But beware, your company has a silent threat.
Memory loss.
No, not you, your company.
Hundreds of conversations happen every day, and nobody remembers any of them.
Two months ago, Jim's team had a very important meeting, a meeting that no one can seem to recall.
Jim included.
So Jim asked around.
The COO says, check the documents.
The CFO says, what meeting?
The CTO says, ask Bob.
Three memories, all wrong.
So Jim did what any good leader would do.
Talk to people.
Read the documents.
Schedules more meetings.
It starts over and over and over.
But there was a better way.
Jim didn't need more information.
He needed Centra.
Centra knows your company better than anyone.
It tells you and your bosses what to focus on.
And even does the work for them.
